name: zoom-meeting-cost
description: Zoom App that shows the live estimated cost of a meeting in a shared view.

scripts.test: npm --workspace client run test && npm --workspace server run test && node --test scripts/secret-scan/*.test.mjs
scripts.postinstall: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
